steps.title: Introduce the movement fully
steps.content: A new audience needs the movement's identity and core goals. The notes say the international Slow Food movement was founded in 1989 and promotes healthy, high-quality food, sustainable production, and fair treatment and compensation for food production workers. A strong introduction should combine the founding context with the movement's values rather than isolate one note.

steps.title: Reject partial introductions
steps.content: Choice B gives founding dates but not the movement's purpose. Choice C mentions only workers. Choice D includes food access and sustainability but omits fair treatment and compensation for workers. The answer is A.
